title: Iterative Inorder Traversal
description:
Return the inorder traversal of a binary tree without recursion using a stack.

    

Constraints:
    - 0 ≤ nodes ≤ 10^5
explanation:
Intuition
Inorder visits left, node, right. The iterative version simulates the call stack by pushing nodes while walking left.

Approach
1. Initial Setup: Push while going left
2. Main Algorithm: Pop, record node, then go right
3. Return Result: Repeat until stack and current are empty

Complexity Analysis
- Time Complexity: O(n)
- Space Complexity: O(h)

Key Insights
- Stack mirrors recursion
- Works on any binary tree

Common Pitfalls
- Forgetting to advance to right child
- Infinite loop if current not updated
